title: Creeper Dollars
description: A simple currency mod for trading with your fiends!
body:
Creeper Dollars is a currency mod that adds a few new items to the game!



Creeper Dollars range from 1 Creeper Dollar to 100 Creeper Dollars including a 50 cent coin and a 1 Creeper Dollar coin!

 


The mod also adds 2 new machines!

The Plate press which is used to press iron and gold plates and the Coin press which uses those plates to make coins!



There is also a Cash register in which you can store your money!

 

The mod also adds a security strip and a watermark which are used in crafting the banknotes and a wallet to keep your money in it (not in the 1.12.2 version though! Sorry!) 



The mod is for mostly for multiplayer purposes but you can use it in singleplayer too!



You can use the mod in any of your modpacks you create!

And as always have FUN :)

Also check us out on CurseForge! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creeper-dollars
